text:
Once upon a time, in the tranquil forest of Willowbrook, lived a wise old owl named Aled. Aled had spent his days perched on ancient trees, sharing secrets and whispers among the leaves, but today was different. He was ready for his annual migration, navigating through the familiar woods back to his sanctuary.

The path was lined with the soft glow of late sunlight filtering through dappled light. As Aled took flight, he felt an odd thrill rippling through his feathers. Today, the trees seemed to speak to him, directing him along winding paths that hummed with magic unseen by mortal ears.

After hours of graceful flight, Aled found himself atop a towering oak, its boughs spreading out like a grand, ancient fan. Just then, a tiny glimmer caught his eye. Investigating, he discovered a curious creature perched on a lower branch - a baby squirrel who looked lost.
